TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Hassan Adams sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. mhtuw sa ryax sa 15 tay byacing tay 5 na kawas tay 1949, sinsyuw ptkura' mari' na Amirika'. Kinwagiq niya' ga 196 senci', kinz'suw niya' ga 95kiro gramu. banggo'pinlukus niya' ga 12 ruw 53. kki'an niya' sa tmmari' ga pglaing tay glaing ru pslsul tay suruw. pgwazyaw sa giqas na sinsyuw na NBA sa kawas tay 1972 ga, maki' squw mincyugal mthwiru' lga, syun kya sa tay 46 binkgan lalu' niya' ruw wal galun kya na gluw na Milwaukee deer team la. Babaw niya' lga wal mluw sa ABA na San Diego la, ruw ryax knaki' niya' sa ptkura' mari' ga aring kawas tay 1972 ruw mucing kawas tay 1975. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ħas~ɕs~ɕan a*ams~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. mħtuw s~ɕa rjax s~ɕa ** taj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * na kawas~ɕ taj ****, s~ɕins~ɕjuw ptkuraʔ mariʔ na amirikaʔ. kinwaɣiq nijaʔ ɣa *** s~ɕenʦ~ʨiʔ, kinzʔs~ɕuw nijaʔ ɣa **kiro ɣramu. βaŋɣoʔpinlukus~ɕ nijaʔ ɣa ** ruw **. kkiʔan nijaʔ s~ɕa tmmariʔ ɣa pɣlaiŋ taj ɣlaiŋ ru ps~ɕls~ɕul taj s~ɕuruw. pɣwazjaw s~ɕa ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕins~ɕjuw na nβa s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** ɣa, makiʔ s~ɕquw minʦ~ʨjuɣal mtħwiruʔ lɣa, s~ɕjun kja s~ɕa taj ** βinkɣan laluʔ nijaʔ ruw wal ɣalun kja na ɣluw na milwaukee *eer team la. βaβaw nijaʔ lɣa wal mluw s~ɕa aβa na s~ɕan *ieɣo la, ruw rjax knakiʔ nijaʔ s~ɕa ptkuraʔ mariʔ ɣa ariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** ruw muʦ~ʨiŋ kawas~ɕ taj ****. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Hassan Adams sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. mhtuw sa ryax sa 15 tay byacing tay 5 na kawas tay 1949, sinsyuw ptkura' mari' na Amirika'. Kinwagiq niya' ga 196 senci', kinz'suw niya' ga 95kiro gramu. banggo'pinlukus niya' ga 12 ruw 53. kki'an niya' sa tmmari' ga pglaing tay glaing ru pslsul tay suruw. pgwazyaw sa giqas na sinsyuw na NBA sa kawas tay 1972 ga, maki' squw mincyugal mthwiru' lga, syun kya sa tay 46 binkgan lalu' niya' ruw wal galun kya na gluw na Milwaukee deer team la. Babaw niya' lga wal mluw sa ABA na San Diego la, ruw ryax knaki' niya' sa ptkura' mari' ga aring kawas tay 1972 ruw mucing kawas tay 1975. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ħas~ɕs~ɕan a*ams~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. mħtuw s~ɕa rjax s~ɕa ** taj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * na kawas~ɕ taj ****, s~ɕins~ɕjuw ptkuraʔ mariʔ na amirikaʔ. kinwaɣiq nijaʔ ɣa *** s~ɕenʦ~ʨiʔ, kinzʔs~ɕuw nijaʔ ɣa **kiro ɣramu. βaŋɣoʔpinlukus~ɕ nijaʔ ɣa ** ruw **. kkiʔan nijaʔ s~ɕa tmmariʔ ɣa pɣlaiŋ taj ɣlaiŋ ru ps~ɕls~ɕul taj s~ɕuruw. pɣwazjaw s~ɕa ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕins~ɕjuw na nβa s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** ɣa, makiʔ s~ɕquw minʦ~ʨjuɣal mtħwiruʔ lɣa, s~ɕjun kja s~ɕa taj ** βinkɣan laluʔ nijaʔ ruw wal ɣalun kja na ɣluw na milwaukee *eer team la. βaβaw nijaʔ lɣa wal mluw s~ɕa aβa na s~ɕan *ieɣo la, ruw rjax knakiʔ nijaʔ s~ɕa ptkuraʔ mariʔ ɣa ariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** ruw muʦ~ʨiŋ kawas~ɕ taj ****. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
